head.title: Brief Forecast for all New Zealand

div.div:
www.metservice.com is currently unavailable so you have been redirected to our backup site www2.metservice.com.
This site contains all the safety critical information and includes MetService Severe Weather Watches and Warnings, MetService rain radar imagery and brief forecast information.
We are working to restore www.metservice.com as soon as we possibly can. You can also follow us on Facebook @MetService and Twitter @MetService

div.h1: Brief Forecast for all New Zealand
div.p: Northland, Auckland, Coromandel Peninsula, also Rotorua and Taupo, Manawatu, Horowhenua, Kapiti Coast and Wellington
Cloudy periods. Isolated showers in Northland today, clearing for a time tomorrow morning.
The remainder of the North Island, also Marlborough, Nelson, Buller, Grey and Westland
Fine apart from areas of morning and evening cloud or fog.
Canterbury, Otago and mainland Southland
Fine with occasional high cloud. Morning fog or frost patches tomorrow.
Fiordland and Stewart Island
Mostly cloudy with isolated showers, clearing Stewart Island today.
Chatham Islands
Mostly cloudy with the chance of a shower or two. Becoming fine for a time tomorrow morning.
Tuesday

North Island: Partly cloudy. A few showers about Northland spreading to Bay of Plenty later.
South Island: Mostly cloudy with a few showers about Fiordland. Fine elsewhere, apart from early cloud about the east coast.
Wednesday

North Island: Scattered showers on and north of the Central Plateau, and also about Kapiti and Wellington. Mainly fine in the east.
South Island: Showers turning to rain in the west, with heavy falls at night. Scattered rain in east later.
Thursday

North Island: Scattered showers in the north. Periods of rain developing elsewhere, possibly heavy in the south and west.
South Island: Heavy rain in the west and scattered falls in the east clearing.
Friday

North Island: Scattered showers north of the Central Plateau clearing the upper north later.
South Island: Showers in Fiordland turning to heavy rain in the west later, with scattered falls in the east.
Chatham Islands
Cloudy periods. Chance of drizzle on Wednesday, then rain Thursday night and Friday morning. Westerlies, turning northerly on Tuesday and becoming strong on Thursday.
Issued: 11:20am Sunday 3 May 2026
© 2026 MetService. All rights reserved

body.script: var gaJsHost = (("https:" == document.location.protocol) ? "https://ssl." : "http://www."); document.write(unescape("%3Cscript src='" + gaJsHost + "google-analytics.com/ga.js' type='text/javascript'%3E%3C/script%3E"));
